title: Crunchyroll’s 2026 Anime of the Year Nominees, Ranked by Their Chances to Win
content: One of the most exciting events in the anime industry, Crunchyroll’s Anime Awards, is right around the corner, and preparations are already underway. At the heart of the event are the nominees, and Crunchyroll has revealed the contenders across its various categories.
author: ComicBook

title: Kamen Rider Franchise Establishes New Label for Animated Films With 1st Project by Aniplex, Shirogumi
content: Toei announced on Friday the establishment of a "The Kamen Rider Animated" label for animated film projects in the Kamen Rider franchise. The first work will be a co-production between Aniplex and Shirogumi . The news was announced at a 55th anniversary announcement event for the franchise on Friday.
author: ANN

title: Hulu to Stream MAO Anime
content: Update: Entertainment news site Variety confirmed on Friday Viz Media holds the North American and select international streaming rights to the anime The company's rights also cover TV, home video, electronic sell-through, and video-on-demand across North America, Latin America, Australia, and New Zealand.
author: ANN

title: The Strongest Job is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage Anime Gets Game on April 23 With English Release
content: Sunsoft announced on Friday it is developing a game based on The Strongest Job is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! , the television anime of Atekichi 's Saikyō no Shokugyō wa Yūsha Demo Kenja Demo Naku Kantei-shi (Kari) Rashii Desu yo? light novel series.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll, Aniplex's Joint Venture Hayate Acquires Anime Studio Lay-duce
content: HAYATE Inc. was founded in March 2025 and is headquartered in Tokyo. Aniplex 's Masanori Miyake leads the venture as Chairman and CEO along with President and COO Leo Watanabe. The staff is composed of Aniplex and Crunchyroll employees.
author: ANN

title: Parasite Director Joon-Ho Bong Reveals 1st Animated Feature Ally for Global Release
content: Director Joon-ho Bong is developing his first animated feature film, Ally , with a planned worldwide release following completion in the first half of 2027. CJ ENM, one of the largest movie production and distribution companies in Korea, announced the film on Friday.
author: ANN

title: Additional Cast for 'Yani Neko' Announced
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Nyannyan Factory 's Yani Neko ( Chainsmoker Cat ) manga revealed additional cast and a key visual (pictured) on Friday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX and BS11 at 12:30 a.m. every Thursday, starting on July 3.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 10 Best Anime to Watch on Netflix in April 2026
content: 2026 is off to an exciting start as the winter season lineup introduces fans to some of the greatest anime ever and has an exciting list of upcoming series for the rest of the year. Some of the season’s biggest series include the sequel seasons of Jujutsu Kaisen, Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End , and more.
author: ComicBook

title: Chainsmoker Cat Anime Announces 6 More Cast Members, July 2 Debut
content: The official website for the anime of Nyan Nyan Factory 's Chainsmoker Cat (Yani Neko) manga announced more cast members and the July 2 premiere for the television series on Friday.
author: ANN

title: 11 Years Later, Netflix Is Finally Streaming One of The Biggest Isekai Anime of All Time
content: Netflix keeps surprising fans with one exciting release after another. 2026 is especially turning out to be one of the best years for anime fans as the platform began streaming the Shonen Jump classic by Hideaki Sorachi, Gintama . As expected, the new slate for the rest of the year looks as intriguing as ever.
author: ComicBook
